name: cross-session-memory-bridge
description: Codex plugin wrapper for the cross-session memory bridge.

interface.longDescription: Exposes the existing Postgres-backed cross-session memory bridge as Codex MCP tools for search, recall, context briefs, and maintenance.
defaultPrompt: Search project memory before we start changing code.
Build a context brief for this task from prior sessions.
Save an important lesson from this session.
